title: The Lofi Starter Pack
description: Welcome to lofi! If you've never cared about lofi music at all, this music pack is just for you!

title: The Lofi Intermediate Pack
description: More lofi songs, for those who want a little more.

title: The Lofi Advanced Pack
description: Unique lofi songs that may be hard to enjoy, but that I still keep coming back to. Contains jazz, mouth harps and actual singing...

title: The Lofi DLC Pack
description: Bonus lofi songs! Includes game OST remixes and other whimsical tunes.

title: The Not-So Lofi Pack
description: Songs that aren't lofi, but deserve to be. Includes classical guitar, breakup songs and... Dino-synth?

title: The Anti-Lofi Pack
description: Songs that are anything but lofi. This pack is for you if you've vigorously hated everything else on this page.

title: The Lofi Rainy Pack
description: Rainy & wet lofi songs! Enjoy 2 days and 1 night under a musical storm.

title: The Lofi Sleepy Pack
description: Lofi songs for sleeping (or failing to fall asleep) to. 1 song per hour, 5 PM to 9 PM!

title: The Lofi Apocalypse Pack
description: Lofi songs for when the world burns in the end of all things.

title: The Lofi World Tour
description: Lofi music themed around places across the world. Leave NZ and travel west: Japan, China, Middle East, Europe, America, and back to NZ!

title: The Lofi Galactic Pack
description: Lofi songs for stargazing and going to the edge of the universe.

title: The Lofi Time Travel Pack
description: Lofi songs for time travellers. Visit Ancient Greece, or the cold of the Soviet Union, or even your own past...
